L. 98–242, title I, § 110(b)98 Stat. 101Mar. 22, 1984“Rules and regulations issued prior to the date of enactment of this Act [] under the authority of [this chapter] shall remain in full force and effect under this Act [repealing this chapter and enacting chapter 109 (§ 10301 et seq.) of this title] until superseded by new rules and regulations promulgated under this Act.”Mar. 22, 1984Public Law 95–467
